stemHtml: EU regulation No. 965/2012 (EASA AIR OPS Part-NCC) deals with…

options.a: Non-commercial air operations using complex motor-powered aircraft.
options.b: Non-commercial air operations using other than complex motor-powered aircraft.
options.c: Commercial air operations using complex motor-powered aircraft.
options.d: Commercial air operations using other than complex motor-powered aircraft.
